name: db_only_phase_wave5_activity_truth_and_telemetry
outcome_goal: Remaining observability and truth-loop gaps are closed by persisting debate metrics, wiring production retrieval telemetry, and proving activity feedback remains evidence-backed.
anti_requirements: Do not widen this wave into command-bus or authority-cleanup seams.
Do not let telemetry failure break retrieval or debate execution.
Do not silently mutate canonical activity definitions while proving the truth loop.

jobs.label: debate_metrics_persistence
jobs.prompt: Resolve `BUG-718C3494` by persisting debate-round metrics and consensus to Postgres instead of leaving them in memory only. Keep the existing in-memory collector as working state, but flush durable evidence at the end of debate execution.

jobs.label: retrieval_telemetry_production_wiring
jobs.prompt: Resolve `BUG-965E983B` by wiring production retrieval paths into the existing telemetry store. Record production-like pattern names, result counts, and latency without letting telemetry failure affect retrieval correctness.

jobs.label: activity_truth_feedback_proof
jobs.prompt: Add proof coverage that workflow runs, receipts, events, and newly durable observability artifacts can be bound back into the activity truth loop without silently mutating canonical definitions. Keep the proof evidence-linked and DB-backed.
